name: Andronicus and those with him
Ivan Ziatyk, Protohegumen of the Redemptorists and Martyr.
kontakia: (Tone 8) We praise Andronicus, the apostle of Christ,* the bright star who enlightened the pagans with understanding of God.* We also praise Junias who laboured along with him* in bringing the Gospel to the pagans.* We cry out: implore God for us unceasingly.
